data.title: Amazon-Style Return To Office Policy Doesn't Await Spotify Employees: 'Can't Spend A Lot Of Time Hiring Grown-Ups And Then Treat Them Like Children'
data.description: Spotify Technology is sticking to its work-from-anywhere policy, diverging from the trend of companies such as Amazon.com Inc. that are calling employees back to the office.

data.title: Ahead Of Trump Vs. Harris Faceoff, ChatGPT Parent OpenAI Uncovers Election Interference Misuse, But Sees No 'Meaningful Breakthrough'
data.description: OpenAI revealed that its platform has been misused by malicious entities attempting to interfere with democratic elections worldwide, but none of these efforts gained significant traction or viral engagement.

data.title: Christopher Nolan Taps Matt Damon For Mystery 2026 IMAX Epic: Is Universal's Big Bet Likely To Payoff?
data.description: Christopher Nolan is reportedly teaming up with Matt Damon for a new IMAX film set for release in 2026, marking their third collaboration following the success of "Oppenheimer."
